Terms and Conditions

Please read carefully before using furniva.in.

Please read the Terms and Conditions carefully before using furniva.in. This electronic record is generated by a computer system and does not require any physical or digital signatures.

1. Introduction

Welcome to Furniva.in, an online marketplace for high-quality wooden furniture, home lifestyle items, and office furniture in India. By accessing and using the Site, you agree to comply with these terms. Furniva reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time without prior notice.

2. Conditions of Use

Your Account — You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and are liable for activities occurring under your account.

License to Use Site — You are granted a limited license for personal, non-commercial use only. This does not permit modification, commercial use, or unauthorized transfer of Site content.

3. User Conduct

Users must use the Site lawfully and responsibly. Prohibited activities include fraudulent activity, uploading offensive or illegal content, unauthorized access attempts, and commercial misuse of Site content.

4. Intellectual Property Rights

All intellectual property on the Site, including graphics, text, and software, is owned by or licensed to Furniva.

5. Product Information and Policy

  • Product Descriptions: Images and descriptions are for reference. Actual products may vary slightly due to wood texture, finish, and natural variations.
  • Pricing: All prices are in Indian Rupees and include applicable taxes.
  • Orders and Payments: Orders are subject to acceptance and availability.
  • Delivery and Installation: Free delivery is available for the first delivery attempt; installation depends on the product's specifications.

6. Limitation of Liability

Furniva is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Site.

7. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Jaipur, India.
